template_data.headline_html: Four certs. Which one actually moves?

items.title: 8(a)
items.sub: Sole-source to $4.5M — highest ceiling if you survive eligibility.

items.title: WOSB
items.sub: Only authorized in specific NAICS codes. Check the list first.

items.title: SDVOSB
items.sub: VA and DoD pull is real — and you can sub to holders too.

items.title: HUBZone
items.sub: Geography-locked. The eligible map updates yearly — verify your address.

items.title: None yet?
items.sub: Pull USASpending.gov for your NAICS before you apply to anything.

template_data.image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout. Dark navy background throughout. Bold headline top: 'PICK THE CERT THAT WINS' in white. Five horizontal checklist rows stacked vertically, each with a short 1-3 word label in cyan on the left and a tiny icon on the right — row 1: '8(a)' with briefcase icon, row 2: 'WOSB' with star badge icon, row 3: 'SDVOSB' with shield icon, row 4: 'HUBZONE' with map pin icon, row 5: 'NO CERT YET' with magnifying glass icon. Each row separated by a thin navy divider line. Left accent stripe in bright cyan running full height. Small green checkmarks beside active rows. Bottom banner: dark charcoal strip with label 'KNOW YOUR SET-ASIDE DATA'. Footer text: 'Jason · GSA Focus'.
